displayTitle: Classic Star Wars #09: The Night Beast (pt.2)
synopsis: Leia, Luke, Han, and Chewie finally make it back to Rebel headquarters in the Yavin system only to find it under attack by Imperial forces! With the Millennium Falcon help, the Rebels emerge victorious. But even as they celebrate, the battle sparks some unexpected results – in the form of an ancient threat that lurks within the very heart of Yavin's moon!
title: Classic Star Wars #09: The Night Beast (pt.2)
